commentaries.author: Cornelius a Lapide
commentaries.content: Philip came and told Andrew: and again Andrew and Philip told Jesus. Cornelius a Lapide Philip cometh and telleth Andrew (as the greater and elder Apostle), and again Andrew and Philip tell Jesus. Andrew had the greater authority with Jesus, as having been the first called, and as having brought to Him his brother Peter. Having consulted together, they mention the whole matter to Jesus before introducing the Gentiles: for they had heard Jesus say, "Go not into the way of the Gentiles" ( Matthew 10:5).
